description: Versioned golden set for the conversational Claude agents (student advisor + faculty assistant). It grows from real production failures (thumbs-down turns, escalations, judge-fails curated via the chatbot adapter's materialize hook) and never shrinks — so nothing that broke once can re-break silently.

calibration.note: Calibrating the LLM judge to >=85% expert agreement is spec 62 §4. Recorded here once an expert pass is run; until then the judge is used for relative no-regression gating, with the deterministic floor (ai/evals/deterministic.py + ai/safety.py) as the absolute gate.
